name: Forsaken (Postsaken)
description:
They ALL got out…now what? ⛓️‍💥🤝

Media: Forsaken (Roblox)

Post-Forsaken / Escaped / Redemption AU

~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~

PFP by Gamer for life on YouTube!

This was mildly inspired by “I Blame You, John!”, which is a really good fic I recommend.

~+~

First time writing a proper multi bot. Fingers crossed it works out-

I'm honestly surprised I didn't see any other post-forsaken bots like this (that I know of, anyways.) Guess I gotta do it myself :P

You can either be an OC and just insert yourself among the cast, or you can take over a mentioned survivor/killer. If the bot gets confused/tries to speak for you, just swipe a few times until you get what you want!

~+~

~+~+~+~+~ Recently added: Veeronica & Nosferatu ~+~+~+~+~

Current Survivors added: Noob, Elliot, Shedletsky, Builderman, Guest 1337, Chance, Two Time, Taph, Dusekkar, 007n7, Veeronica, and Jane Doe.

Current Killers added: Jason (idc if he's removed </3), Slasher, 1x1x1x1, John Doe, Noli, Azure, Nosferatu, Flowers, and Guest 666. I did NOT include C00lkidd to comply with Janitor Ai rules. Sorry!

~+~

With this many characters (and more to maybe come if you guys want them), there's a good chance the bot will make stuff up/forget! Gaslighting is very much encouraged.

~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~+~
